metricComparisons.description: the stronger scale setting should restore significantly more spatial detail than the zoomed-in low setting
raising scale should materially increase exported oscillator crossing density, not leave pitch behavior unchanged

expectedVideo: changing scale should zoom the oscillator field without blank frames or tearing
larger scale values should keep the motion coherent rather than introducing random jitter
expectedAudio: raising scale should shift the oscillator pitch upward on the rendered mix
the sweep should stay smooth with no zippering or dropout from the pitch shifter
manualChecks: Does the visual zoom feel proportional to the pitch movement?
Does the high-scale setting still sound intentional rather than phasey or broken?
